query:
SELECT 
  a.id as appointment_id,
  a.clientId,
  a.scheduledDate,
  a.status,
  a.createdAt,
  c.name as client_name,
  c.whatsappPhone,
  c.email as client_email,
  c.userId as client_userId
FROM appointments a
JOIN clients c ON a.clientId = c.id
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
